cupcakes.name: Assorted Dozen
cupcakes.description: In a panic or can't decide? Just hit the add to cart button, and we'll pick 12 delicious treats for you.

cupcakes.name: Chocolate Peanut Butter
cupcakes.description: A chocolate cupcake with rich peanut butter frosting and a handmade PB cup wedge.
cupcakes.ingredients: Cupcake base: flour, milk, butter, sugar, eggs, cocoa powder, baking soda, vanilla extract. Icing: cream cheese, butter, icing sugar, vanilla extract, peanut butter. Decoration: Dark Chocolate 54%, Peanut Butter, White chocolate, canola oil.

cupcakes.name: Chocolate Hazelnut
cupcakes.description: Chocolate cupcake topped with chocolate ganache and caramelized hazelnuts.
cupcakes.ingredients: Cupcake base: flour, milk, butter, sugar, eggs, cocoa powder, baking soda, vanilla extract. Icing: dark chocolate, cream. Decoration: hazelnuts, sugar.

cupcakes.name: Vanilla Coconut
cupcakes.description: Vanilla cupcake with vanilla frosting topped with flaked coconut.
cupcakes.ingredients: Cupcake base: flour, milk, butter, sugar, eggs, baking powder, vanilla extract. Icing: cream cheese, butter, icing sugar, vanilla extract. Decoration: shredded or flaked coconut, sugar.

cupcakes.name: Chocolate Coconut
cupcakes.description: Chocolate cupcake with vanilla frosting topped with flaked coconut.
cupcakes.ingredients: Cupcake base: flour, milk, butter, sugar, eggs, cocoa powder, baking soda, vanilla extract. Icing: cream cheese, butter, icing sugar, vanilla extract. Decoration: shredded or flaked coconut, sugar.

cupcakes.name: Chocolate Chocolate
cupcakes.description: Chocolate cupcake topped with chocolate cream cheese frosting and a chocolate flower.
cupcakes.ingredients: Cupcake base: flour, milk, butter, sugar, eggs, cocoa powder, baking soda, vanilla extract. Icing: cream cheese, butter, icing sugar, cocoa powder, vanilla extract. Decoration: dark chocolate.

cupcakes.name: Chocolate Vanilla
cupcakes.description: Chocolate cupcake topped with a vanilla cream cheese frosting and a fondant flower.
cupcakes.ingredients: Cupcake base: flour, milk, butter, sugar, eggs, cocoa powder, baking soda, vanilla extract. Icing: cream cheese, butter, icing sugar, vanilla extract. Decoration: fondant flower.

cupcakes.name: Red Velvet
cupcakes.description: Classic US southern red velvet cupcake with a vanilla cream cheese frosting topped with red and white chocolate curls.

cupcakes.name: Vanilla Vanilla
cupcakes.description: Vanilla cupcake topped with vanilla frosting and a hand-crafted fondant flower.
cupcakes.ingredients: Cupcake base: flour, milk, butter, sugar, eggs, baking powder, vanilla extract. Icing: cream cheese, butter, icing sugar, vanilla extract. Decoration: fondant flower.

cupcakes.name: Vanilla Chocolate
cupcakes.description: Vanilla cupcake topped with chocolate frosting and a tri-colour Callebaut chocolate ball.
cupcakes.ingredients: Cupcake base: flour, milk, butter, sugar, eggs, baking powder, vanilla extract. Icing: cream cheese, butter, icing sugar, cocoa powder, vanilla extract. Decoration: chocolate ball.

cupcakes.name: Vanilla Chocolate Ganache
cupcakes.description: Vanilla cupcake topped with dark chocolate ganache and a chocolate wafer.
cupcakes.ingredients: Cupcake base: flour, milk, butter, sugar, eggs, baking powder, vanilla extract. Icing: dark chocolate, cream. Decoration: chocolate wafer.

cupcakes.name: Chocolate Caramel
cupcakes.description: Chocolate cupcake filled with creamy Dulce de leche filling, covered with vanilla icing and topped with caramel crisp pearls.
cupcakes.ingredients: Cupcake base: flour, milk, butter, sugar, eggs, cocoa powder, baking soda, vanilla extract. Filling: Dulce de Leche. Icing: cream cheese, butter, icing sugar, vanilla extract. Decoration: crisp pearls.

cupcakes.name: Vanilla Caramel
cupcakes.description: Vanilla cupcake filled with creamy Dulce de leche filling, covered with vanilla icing and topped with caramel crisp pearls.
cupcakes.ingredients: Cupcake base: flour, milk, butter, sugar, eggs, baking powder, vanilla extract. Filling: Dulce de Leche. Icing: cream cheese, butter, icing sugar, vanilla extract. Decoration: crisp pearls.

cupcakes.name: Chocolate Caramel II
cupcakes.description: Chocolate cupcake topped with caramel-infused icing and a piece of our own in-bakery-made chocolate-covered brittle.
cupcakes.ingredients: Cupcake base: flour, milk, butter, sugar, eggs, cocoa powder, baking soda, vanilla extract. Icing: cream cheese, butter, icing sugar, Dulce de Leche, vanilla extract. Decoration: brittle.

cupcakes.name: Lemon
cupcakes.description: Vanilla cupcake filled with lemon custard, topped with cream cheese frosting and our own in-bakery-made jelly lemon slice.

cupcakes.name: Chocolate Toffee
cupcakes.description: Chocolate cupcake filled with English toffee and chocolate ganache, topped with variegated mini crisp pearls.

cupcakes.name: Chocolate Oreo
cupcakes.description: Chocolate cupcake topped with oreo/vanilla frosting and a mini oreo cookie.

cupcakes.name: Humming Bird
cupcakes.description: Classic US southern banana, pineapple, and pecan cupcake with cream cheese frosting, topped with a roasted pecan.

cupcakes.name: Chocolate Vanilla Chocolate Ganache
cupcakes.description: Chocolate cupcake filled with chocolate ganache, topped with vanilla frosting and chocolate rocks.

cupcakes.name: Red Velvet Fudge
cupcakes.description: Classic US southern red velvet cupcake, chocolate ganache filling, topped with vanilla frosting and chocolate rocks.

cupcakes.name: Chocolate Chocolate Ganache
cupcakes.description: Chocolate cupcake filled with chocolate ganache, topped with more chocolate ganache and french cut chocolate sprinkles.

cupcakes.name: Hot Fudge Sundae
cupcakes.description: Chocolate cupcake with vanilla frosting, topped with sprinkles, hazelnuts, chocolate ganache, and a maraschino cherry.

cupcakes.name: Chocolate Mocha
cupcakes.description: Chocolate cupcake with mocha frosting, topped with a dark chocolate coffee bean.

cupcakes.name: Red Velvet Raspberry
cupcakes.description: Red Velvet cupcake, topped with raspberry frosting and a red chocolate raspberry.

cupcakes.name: Vanilla Strawberry
cupcakes.description: Vanilla cupcake, topped with strawberry frosting and pink chocolate curls.

cupcakes.name: Christmas Dozen
cupcakes.description: Happy Holidays! Toronto Cupcake is bringing joy and good cheer with our special Christmas dozen cupcakes. Gingerbread people, Candy Canes, Christmas Trees, Ornaments all on delicious cupcakes. Beautifully boxed and decorated, these cupcakes come with an envelope, card, and your personal message.

cupcakes.name: Valentine's Day Dozen
cupcakes.description: A delicious selection of a dozen Valentine's Day Cupcakes, including one topped with a heart-shaped chocolate truffle. Beautifully boxed and decorated, these cupcakes come with an envelope, card, and your personal message.

cupcakes.name: Pride Cupcake
cupcakes.description: Celebrating diversity and pride! Available 25 June - 5 July or by special order.

cupcakes.name: Easter Cupcake
cupcakes.description: A variety of colours and decorations. Available by special request.

cupcakes.name: Mother's Day Dozen
cupcakes.description: Spoil your mom this Mother's Day with a beautiful selection of cupcakes featuring hearts, butterflies, and flowers. Three cupcakes include hand-pressed discs spelling "MOM" to make the day extra special.

cupcakes.name: Canada Day
cupcakes.description: Oh Canada! A red velvet cupcake topped with vanilla frosting and a fondant maple leaf. Available 26 June - 4 July or by special order.

cupcakes.name: St Patty's Day
cupcakes.description: For the Irish in all of us. Chocolate or Vanilla cupcake with green or vanilla frosting topped with a lucky fondant shamrock. Available 15 March - 20 March or by special order.

cupcakes.name: Beaches Jazz
cupcakes.description: Nothing like cool jazz and a cupcake! This cupcake hits all the right notes. Available June - July or by special order.

cupcakes.name: Toronto International Film Festival
cupcakes.description: Lights, Camera, Action! A chocolate cupcake with Madagascar bourbon vanilla frosting topped with chocolate comedy and tragedy masks. Available September 7-18 or by special order.

cupcakes.name: Custom Cupcakes
cupcakes.description: Challenge us! Custom means just that. Bring your idea, and we will turn it into a cupcake masterpiece.

cupcakes.name: Just for Kids
cupcakes.description: Cookie Monster, Elmo, and a host of other characters. Let us know who you'd like to see when ordering. $4.00 each | $24.00 half dozen | $48 dozen.

cupcakes.name: Custom Birthday
cupcakes.description: Custom Birthday Cupcakes! Send us a design or picture, and we will recreate it!

cupcakes.name: Portrait / Custom Image
cupcakes.description: Personalised Photo Cupcakes! Highlight that great smile on top of any of our cupcakes!
